recommendations.title: Hocus Pocus
recommendations.overview: After 300 years of slumber, three sister witches are accidentally resurrected in Salem on Halloween night, and it is up to three kids and their newfound feline friend to put an end to the witches' reign of terror once and for all.

recommendations.title: The Craft
recommendations.overview: A Catholic school newcomer falls in with a clique of teen witches who wield their powers against all who dare to cross them -- be they teachers, rivals or meddlesome parents.

recommendations.title: Mädchen in Uniform
recommendations.overview: A sensitive girl is sent to an all-girls boarding school and develops a romantic attachment to one of her teachers.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo and the Ghoul School
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, TV Movie, Mystery, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Scooby, Shaggy and Scrappy are on their way to a Miss Grimwood's Finishing School for Girls, where they've been hired as gym teachers. Once there, however, they find that not only is it actually an all-girl school of famous monsters' daughters but th

recommendations.title: Me Against You: Mr. S's Vendetta
recommendations.overview: A young couple who makes popular YouTube videos for children sets out to win an award, but an evil mastermind stands in the way of their success.

recommendations.title: Hocus Pocus 2
recommendations.overview: 29 years since the Black Flame Candle was last lit, the 17th-century Sanderson sisters are resurrected, and they are looking for revenge. Now it's up to three high school students to stop the ravenous witches from wreaking a new kind of havoc on Sale

recommendations.title: Teen Wolf
recommendations.overview: When a shy teenager's new-found powers help him score at basketball - and with the popular girls - he has some pretty hairy decisions to make.

recommendations.title: The Craft: Legacy
recommendations.overview: An eclectic foursome of aspiring teenage witches get more than they bargained for as they lean into their newfound powers.

recommendations.title: The Illusionist
recommendations.overview: With his eye on a lovely aristocrat, a gifted illusionist named Eisenheim uses his powers to win her away from her betrothed, a crown prince. But Eisenheim's scheme creates tumult within the monarchy and ignites the suspicion of a dogged inspector.

recommendations.title: Above the Shadows
recommendations.overview: A young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible must find her way back with the help of the one man who can see her.
